expectations.text: Uses brave_web_search or web search with site:reddit.com filter
expectations.evidence: Shows: 'site:reddit.com "AI consulting" trends after:2026-02-03' via brave_web_search

expectations.text: Identifies relevant subreddits discussing the topic
Summarizes sentiment and key discussion themes
expectations.evidence: Sentiment: 'Positive'. Themes: AI readiness assessments, vertical AI solutions, AI governance consulting, tool-agnostic approach
Themes have High/Medium ratings. Threads have confidence columns
